rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL VS. TERESA ROLIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Written Discovery From Defendant Maire Dwan; And (2) Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 24, 2017, Line 5. PLAINTIFFS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION To Compel Written Discovery From Defendant Maire Dwan; And (2) Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan. GRANTED. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to Set One of discovery requests propounded by Plaintiff within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $950. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 24, 2017, Line 9. PLAINTIFF JIM JOHNSON'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To: (1) Special Interrogatories; (2) Demand For Inspection And Production Of Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED, subject to opposition.
